title: Pinalia latibracteata
taxonomy: Pinalia latibracteata is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Pinalia. The genus Pinalia is a group of orchids that are native to Asia and are characterized by their relatively large leaves and inflorescences. Pinalia latibracteata is classified as an epiphytic plant, meaning it grows on other plants or surfaces, and is found in tropical regions. The exact classification of Pinalia latibracteata is further detailed in its full binomial nomenclature as Pinalia latibracteata.
